title: Rascal Does Not Dream of Bunny Girl Senpai
altTitles: Seishun Buta Yarou wa Bunny Girl Senpai no Yume wo Minai
description:
Sakuta Azusagawa is a high school student who unexpectedly encounters Mai Sakurajima, a famous actress dressed in a bunny girl outfit wandering through a library unnoticed by everyone around her. Sakuta soon discovers that Mai is suffering from a mysterious phenomenon known as Adolescence Syndrome, a supernatural condition caused by emotional stress and personal insecurities. Wanting to help her, Sakuta becomes involved in Mai’s life and gradually uncovers the hidden struggles affecting the people around him.

As Sakuta meets other girls experiencing similar supernatural problems, he faces emotional conflicts involving loneliness, identity, family issues, and relationships. Through heartfelt conversations, emotional moments, and romantic development between Sakuta and Mai, the series blends comedy, romance, and psychological drama into a touching story about growing up and understanding human emotions.
